description_long: This object consists of three weathered metal barrels, each exhibiting distinct surface wear and coloration. The left barrel is predominantly blue with heavy rust and corrosion, giving it a neglected, aged appearance. The center barrel is red with a white hazard band and a flammable warning symbol, indicating it may have contained or still contains hazardous material. The right barrel is yellow with a radioactive symbol and green liquid stains running down its side, suggesting contamination or chemical leakage. All barrels have cylindrical forms with reinforced horizontal bands and visible rust patches, emphasizing their industrial use and exposure to harsh environments. The tops of the barrels are flat and also show significant rust and discoloration. These barrels are typically found in urban, industrial, or hazardous waste settings.
description: A group of three heavily weathered metal barrels, each with distinct warning symbols and rusted surfaces, suggesting hazardous or industrial use.
description_view_0: Three barrels side by side: blue (left, rusted), red (center, flammable symbol), yellow (right, radioactive symbol and green stains).
description_view_1: Barrels aligned front to back: yellow barrel with green stains in front, followed by red and blue barrels, showing the tops and some side details.
description_view_2: Barrels side by side from the opposite side: yellow (left, green stains), red (center, hazard band), blue (right, rusted).
description_view_3: Barrels aligned front to back: blue barrel in front, followed by red and yellow, showing the tops and rear sides.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: flammable symbol, radioactive symbol, green stains, rust patches
